feature.name: Workflows Template Management And Chat Entry

guardrails: Desktop must never write workflows.json directly.
Only cc-jiangxia-owned workflow config may store user templates.
Built-ins are protected and cannot be edited/deleted in place or shadowed.
Import conflicts default to rename, never overwrite.
Template edits affect future sessions only.
Non-empty chat workflow start creates a linked new workflow session and preserves source chat.
Summarize must be compact-style but non-mutating.
Same-area tests are mandatory for production changes under src/server and desktop/src.
Do not touch protected files, credentials, transcripts, provider/OAuth config, generated quality artifacts, or dependency folders.

dependencyEdges.reason: Registry tests define expected validation/write behavior before implementation.
API tests define route contract before mutation route implementation.
Routes depend on registry validation and write semantics.
Desktop API tests define client/type behavior before implementation.
Desktop client consumes server route shape.
Settings UI uses typed client methods.
Manager mounts through Settings tab.
Editor plugs into manager detail/edit state.
Save/delete/duplicate flows need manager state.
Save/validate flows consume editor draft shape.
Import/export persistence depends on registry write preservation.
Import/export routes extend API module.
Import/export dialogs integrate into Settings manager.
Desktop dialogs consume server preview/commit/export semantics.
Workflow start dialog uses shared template types.
Empty launch wiring consumes reusable dialog.
Linked-session tests define snapshot expectations.
Shared create helper uses registry lookup/snapshot semantics.
Route/service integration shares workflow template lookup semantics.
Linked-session tests define non-mutating summary expectation.
Link service creates target through shared helper.
Link service summarize strategy calls non-mutating helper.
Route delegates to service.
Linked API client extends shared desktop session types.
Desktop client consumes linked route response/errors.
Non-empty workflow UI extends composer dialog flow.
UI calls linked-start API client.
Final verification requires Settings CRUD complete.
Final verification requires import/export complete.
Final verification requires empty chat start complete.
Final verification requires linked non-empty start complete.

parallelBatches.note: Run only tasks whose dependencies are complete; i18n/shared workflow component edits require coordination.

joinPoints.validation: bun run check:server && bun run check:desktop
bun run check:server && bun run check:desktop
bun run check:coverage && bun run verify

conditional: bun run check:persistence-upgrade if persistence shape changes beyond additive workflows.json fields
bun run quality:providers and live baseline when provider credentials are available for summarize evidence
